title: Legends Mod (Core)
description: This is the Core Mod required for any Legends Mod Packs.
body:
![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a54db97301f0aed43f8728036d53aa09bd63238.png)

The Legends Mod is a Minecraft Core mod, created by the LMT, allowing you to use other packs and or create your own packs. Some of the packs consist of Superheroes Unlimited, Anime, Ben 10, Power Rangers, Star Wars, Revenant's Miscellaneous, Kaiju, Dungeons & Dragons, and Horror.

# 
# Requirements
Download: [Azurelib Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/azurelib/version/A0cHpbIs)

(For 1.18.2 Legends Mod) Download: [Azurelib 3.0.14 Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/azurelib/version/Wn4KDLDB)

##  Want to play with others? Join the official Legends Mod server!

IP: Coming Soon!
